nasb.text: Then Saul summoned the people and numbered them in Telaim, 200,000 foot soldiers and 10,000 men of Judah.

esv.text: So Saul summoned the people and numbered them in Telaim, two hundred thousand men on foot, and ten thousand men of Judah.

cnv.text: 於是掃羅招聚眾人，在提拉因數點他們，共有步兵二十萬，另有猶大人一萬。

ccb.text: 于是，扫罗在提拉因召集了二十万步兵，另有从犹大来的一万人。
